title: Jaki Versatile Structures
description: JVS is a structures mod to enhance yours minecraft world with small and medium structures.
body:
About Jaki Versatile Structures

JVS is a mod designed to enhance your Minecraft world with vanilla-style structures filled with loots and new enemies.
These structures use many custom heads to add detail and life, and some of them are also used on mobs to increase diversity during your adventures.

I hope you’ll enjoy exploring these new structures with JVS.
Check the gallery for a first look at the content.

Content of the Mod
31 new vanilla-like structures
News structures you can search for  archeology 
(More updates soon)
Next Updates:
Nothing planned for now.

My others mods :
*  JVS: Nomad
* Ancient Structures: Chinese
